Steps: Submit login form, enter onboarding, complete or skip setup.
User Outcome: User reaches the main app after initial setup.
Implementation Detail: handleLoginSuccess checks needsOnboarding; handleOnboardingComplete routes to home.
Production Consideration: Persist onboarding completion per user account.

Steps: Submit login form after onboarding has already been completed in memory.
Implementation Detail: needsOnboarding controls whether Home or Onboarding is shown.
Production Consideration: Replace local state with server/session state.

Steps: Tap Home, Nearby, Games, Clubs, or Profile.
User Outcome: User moves between primary app areas.
Implementation Detail: TabBar calls handleTabPress; active tab is stored in activeTab.
Production Consideration: Consider URL routing for deep links and browser history.

User Outcome: User returns to prior screen context.
Implementation Detail: history array in App.tsx stores previous Screen objects.
Production Consideration: Current stack is memory-only and resets on reload.

Steps: Tap floating add button, complete form, choose post-create action.
User Outcome: Organizer creates a session and can invite players.
Implementation Detail: FAB calls navigate('create-game'); success uses placeholder ID new.
Production Consideration: Wire to create-game API and real created game ID.

Steps: Tap a game card or featured CTA.
Implementation Detail: HomeScreen routes to game-details with demo ID.
Production Consideration: Fetch game by ID from backend.

User Outcome: Player expects a narrowed game list.
Production Consideration: Add selected filter state and apply it to game query/list.

Steps: Toggle list/map, locate user, tap a court.
Implementation Detail: Nearby uses local viewMode; Leaflet handles map display and locate.
Production Consideration: Replace Austin mock data with geospatial court search.
Add filter state, query parameters, and result updates.

Steps: Tap Games or a weekly game card.
User Outcome: Player finds play options at a venue.
Implementation Detail: Court screen routes to games or game-details.
Production Consideration: Scope game list to selected court.

Steps: Open owned/discovered club or create a new club.
User Outcome: User joins or starts a community.
Implementation Detail: Club cards route by ID; create CTA routes to form.
Production Consideration: Add membership state and create/join endpoints.

Steps: Type query or choose recent result, select result.
User Outcome: User jumps directly to entity detail.
Implementation Detail: Search results route to game, court, club, or profile-related targets.
Production Consideration: Add real search index/API and no-results/loading states.

Implementation Detail: Notification click handler can call onNavigate.
Production Consideration: Store notification target type and target ID from backend.

Steps: Tap Edit Profile, Settings, Notifications, or Logout.
Destination Screen: Edit Profile, Settings, Notifications, or Login
Implementation Detail: ProfileScreen settings item IDs drive navigation; logout resets state.
Production Consideration: Add full settings screens and persisted profile mutations.
